title: Sinch Message Structure
description: Documentation of the message data structure returned by the Sinch Conversation API

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique message identifier assigned by Sinch

fields.name: direction
fields.description: Message direction - TO_APP means received from contact, TO_CONTACT means sent to contact

fields.name: contact_id
fields.description: The contact identifier associated with this message

fields.name: channel_identity
fields.description: The channel and identity used for this message (e.g., SMS number, WhatsApp identity)

fields.name: channel_identity.identity
fields.description: The channel-specific identity (phone number, PSID, etc.)

fields.name: app_message
fields.description: The message content sent to the contact

fields.name: contact_message
fields.description: The message content received from the contact

fields.name: accept_time
fields.description: When the message was accepted by the Sinch platform
